classifications.reasoning: Explicit positive intent ('Yes this is something we've been meaning to look at'), request for a call, signed with first name — clear buying signal.
classifications.suggested_action: Call Claire this week. Prepare website audit before the call. Update lead status to INTERESTED.

classifications.reasoning: Clear rejection ('not interested in any marketing services at this time') with explicit do-not-contact request.
classifications.suggested_action: Stop all follow-ups. Mark lead as LOST. Log do-not-contact preference.

classifications.reasoning: Standard auto-reply OOO message, returns 7th April. Provides alternative contact.
classifications.suggested_action: Pause follow-up sequence. Resume outreach after 7th April. Note alternative contact email.

classifications.reasoning: Respondent explicitly states this is the wrong contact — email goes to workshop not owner. Suggests calling the office.
classifications.suggested_action: Find correct owner email. Try website contact form or call the listed office number. Re-enrich this lead.

classifications.reasoning: Explicit unsubscribe / removal request. GDPR Article 21 — must be actioned immediately.
classifications.suggested_action: Add to suppression list immediately. Mark lead as UNSUBSCRIBED. Do not send any further emails. Log action in audit_log.
classifications.gdpr_note: Unsubscribe request received 2026-04-03T07:12:00Z. Must be processed within 10 days per GDPR.

classifications.reasoning: Strong warm signal: 'really timely', internal alignment ('we've just been talking about'), explicit request for info and pricing, 1-month buying horizon.
classifications.suggested_action: Send a short reply today with a one-page capability PDF and a booking link. Mention 2-3 relevant examples. Update lead status to INTERESTED.
